mapper.select:
SELECT hold_id, product_option_id, count FROM nextjs_shop_stock_hold WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND status = 'HOLD' AND expires_at > NOW() AND product_option_id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO nextjs_shop_stock_hold (user_no, product_option_id, cart_id, count, status, active_hold, expires_at, created_at, return_url) VALUES
( #{r.userNo}, #{r.productOptionId}, #{r.cartId}, #{r.count}, 'HOLD', 1, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{r.ttlSeconds} SECOND), NOW(), #{r.returnUrl} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE cart_id = VALUES(cart_id), count = VALUES(count), active_hold = 1, status = 'HOLD', expires_at = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL
#{rows[0].ttlSeconds}
180
SECOND)

INSERT IGNORE INTO nextjs_shop_user_coupon (user_no, coupon_id) SELECT #{userNo}, c.coupon_id FROM nextjs_shop_coupon c WHERE c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.coupon_id IN
#{couponId}
mapper.select: SELECT sh.hold_id FROM nextjs_shop_stock_hold sh WHERE sh.user_no = #{userNo} AND sh.status = 'HOLD' AND sh.active_hold = 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE nextjs_shop_stock_hold sh JOIN nextjs_shop_product_option po ON po.product_option_id = sh.product_option_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product p ON p.product_id = po.product_id JOIN nextjs_shop_seller s ON s.seller_no = p.seller_no SET sh.expires_at = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{ttlSeconds} SECOND) WHERE sh.user_no = #{userNo} AND sh.status = 'HOLD' AND sh.active_hold = 1 AND sh.expires_at > NOW() AND s.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND p.sale_stop = 0 AND sh.hold_id IN
#{id}

UPDATE nextjs_shop_stock_hold SET status = 'RELEASED', active_hold = 0 WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND status = 'HOLD' AND active_hold = 1 AND hold_id IN
#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM nextjs_shop_stock_hold_coupon WHERE (hold_id, user_coupon_id) IN
(#{request.holdId}, #{request.userCouponId})
mapper.select: SELECT sh.hold_id, sh.count, po.product_option_id, po.add_price, po.size, p.product_id, p.name AS productName, p.origin_price, p.final_price, p.color_name, w.wish_id, s.seller_name, s.base_shipping_fee, s.free_shipping_min_amount, s.extra_shipping_fee, f.file_name, f.store_name, f.file_path, f.copyright, f.copyright_url FROM nextjs_shop_stock_hold sh JOIN nextjs_shop_product_option po ON po.product_option_id = sh.product_option_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product p ON p.product_id = po.product_id LEFT JOIN nextjs_shop_wish w ON w.product_id = p.product_id AND w.user_no = sh.user_no JOIN nextjs_shop_seller s ON s.seller_no = p.seller_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pi.product_id, pi.file_id FROM nextjs_shop_product_image pi INNER JOIN ( SELECT product_id, MIN(sort_key) AS min_sort_key FROM nextjs_shop_product_image GROUP BY product_id ) min_pi ON pi.product_id = min_pi.product_id AND pi.sort_key = min_pi.min_sort_key ) tpi ON tpi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN nextjs_shop_file f ON f.file_id = tpi.file_id WHERE sh.user_no = #{userNo} AND sh.status = 'HOLD' AND sh.active_hold = 1 AND sh.expires_at > NOW() AND s.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND po.stock > 0 AND po.is_displayed = 1 AND p.sale_stop = 0 ORDER BY sh.created_at DESC

SELECT sh.hold_id, sh.return_url, sh.status, sh.active_hold, sh.expires_at, po.stock, po.is_displayed, p.product_id, p.sale_stop, s.approval_status FROM nextjs_shop_stock_hold sh JOIN nextjs_shop_product_option po ON po.product_option_id = sh.product_option_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product p ON p.product_id = po.product_id JOIN nextjs_shop_seller s ON s.seller_no = p.seller_no WHERE sh.user_no = #{userNo} AND sh.created_at = #{latestCreatedAt} ORDER BY sh.hold_id DESC

SELECT * FROM nextjs_shop_stock_hold_coupon WHERE hold_id IN
#{holdId}

SELECT address_id, address_name, recipient_name, address_phone, zonecode, address, address_detail, memo, default_address FROM nextjs_shop_user_address WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND default_address = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nextjs_shop_user_address(address_name, recipient_name, address_phone, zonecode, address, address_detail, memo, default_address, usedate_at, user_no) VALUES (#{address.addressName}, #{address.recipientName}, #{address.addressPhone}, #{address.zonecode}, #{address.address}, #{address.addressDetail}, #{address.memo}, #{setAsDefault}, NOW(), #{userNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE nextjs_shop_user_address SET default_address = 0 WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND default_address = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nextjs_shop_order_group( user_no, seller_coupon_discount_total, cart_coupon_discount_total, shipping_fee, used_mileage, remaining_mileage, earned_mileage, total_price, payment_method, payment_code, address_id, address_name, recipient_name, address_phone, zonecode, address, address_detail, memo) VALUES(#{userNo}, #{sellerCouponDiscountTotal}, #{cartCouponDiscountTotal}, #{shippingFee}, #{usedMileage}, #{remainingMileage}, #{earnedMileage}, #{totalPrice}, #{paymentMethod}, #{paymentCode}, #{addressId}, #{addressName}, #{recipientName}, #{addressPhone}, #{zonecode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{memo})

INSERT INTO nextjs_shop_order_item( order_id, hold_id, product_name, count, size, origin_price, final_price, add_price, coupon_discounted_price, total_price, status) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.holdId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.count}, #{item.size}, #{item.originPrice}, #{item.finalPrice}, #{item.addPrice}, #{item.couponDiscountedPrice}, #{item.totalPrice}, #{item.status})

INSERT INTO nextjs_shop_order_item_coupon( order_item_id, user_coupon_id, discounted_price, coupon_id, description, coupon_code, discount_type, discount_value, max_discount, minimum_order_before_amount) VALUES
(#{item.orderItemId}, #{item.userCouponId}, #{item.discountedPrice}, #{item.couponId}, #{item.description}, #{item.couponCode}, #{item.discountType}, #{item.discountValue}, #{item.maxDiscount}, #{item.minimumOrderBeforeAmount})
mapper.update:
UPDATE nextjs_shop_coupon SET amount = amount - 1, used_count = used_count + 1 WHERE coupon_id IN
#{couponId}
